summary: Frontend-only testing of updated Shop and Services pages. All requested features verified: Pet Soul traits replaced trust badges, all pillars visible, Mira whispers on cards, voice/mic button opens Mira chat, service cards navigate correctly, mobile responsive.
critical_code_review_comments: ShopPage.jsx (766 lines) - Well-structured with Pet Soul traits, Mira whispers, all 16 pillars
ServicesPage.jsx (718 lines) - Clean implementation with breed-specific Mira whispers
MiraChatWidget.jsx - Correctly listens for 'openMiraChat' custom event from voice buttons
Pet Soul traits display 3 personal things about pet (Good boy/girl, Loved unconditionally, Family member) - fallback traits when no pet data
Mira whispers on product cards: 'Quality they deserve', 'Pet parent favorite', 'Tail-wagging approved'
Mira whispers on service cards: 'Curated for your companion's needs' (breed-specific messages available)
All 16 pillars visible on Shop: For You, Celebrate, Dine, Stay, Travel, Care, Enjoy, Fit, Learn, Advisory, Paperwork, Emergency, Farewell, Adopt, Shop, All
All 13 pillars visible on Services: For You, Care, Learn, Stay, Fit, Travel, Celebrate, Advisory, Emergency, Paperwork, Farewell, Adopt, All
Pet switcher code present but only shows when logged-in user has multiple pets
test_credentials: testuser@test.com / test123 - Login successful, redirected to dashboard
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shop and Services pages fully updated and tested. Pet Soul traits replace trust badges. Mira whispers visible on all cards. Voice/mic button opens Mira chat. Service cards navigate to detail pages. Mobile responsive with horizontal scrolling pillars.

features_tested.shop_pet_soul_traits: PASS - Hero shows Pet Soul traits (Good boy/girl, Loved unconditionally, Family member) instead of trust badges
features_tested.shop_all_pillars: PASS - All 16 pillars visible: For You, Celebrate, Dine, Stay, Travel, Care, Enjoy, Fit, Learn, Advisory, Paperwork, Emergency, Farewell, Adopt, Shop, All
features_tested.shop_mira_whispers: PASS - Product cards show Mira whispers (Quality they deserve, Pet parent favorite, Tail-wagging approved)
features_tested.shop_voice_mic_button: PASS - Clicking mic button in search bar opens Mira chat widget
features_tested.shop_mobile_responsive: PASS - 2-column grid, pillars horizontally scrollable, Pet Soul traits visible
features_tested.services_pet_soul_traits: PASS - Hero shows Pet Soul traits (Good pup, Loved, Family) instead of trust badges
features_tested.services_all_pillars: PASS - All 13 pillars visible: For You, Care, Learn, Stay, Fit, Travel, Celebrate, Advisory, Emergency, Paperwork, Farewell, Adopt, All
features_tested.services_mira_whispers: PASS - Service cards show Mira whispers (Curated for your companion's needs)
features_tested.services_voice_mic_button: PASS - Mic button visible in search bar (same functionality as Shop)
features_tested.services_card_navigation: PASS - Clicking service card navigates to /services/{pillar}/{id} (e.g., /services/adopt/svc-adopt-match)
features_tested.services_mobile_responsive: PASS - 2-column grid, pillars horizontally scrollable, Pet Soul traits visible
features_tested.pet_switcher: CONDITIONAL - Code present, only shows when logged-in user has multiple pets

design_review.visual_polish: PASS - Gradient backgrounds, animated pulse effects, smooth hover transitions
design_review.contrast: PASS - White text on dark gradient backgrounds, good readability
design_review.spacing: PASS - Proper padding and margins on all elements
design_review.mobile_layout: PASS - Cards stack properly, filters scroll horizontally

code_implementation_notes.pet_soul_traits_component: PetSoulTraits component extracts traits from pet.doggy_soul_answers or provides breed-specific fallbacks
code_implementation_notes.mira_whispers_shop: getMiraWhisper() function returns breed-specific messages from MIRA_WHISPERS object
code_implementation_notes.mira_whispers_services: getMiraServiceWhisper() function returns breed-specific service recommendations from MIRA_SERVICE_WHISPERS object
code_implementation_notes.voice_button_event: window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('openMiraChat')) triggers Mira chat widget
code_implementation_notes.pet_switcher_logic: Shows when pets.length > 1, allows switching between pets with visual feedback
